title: [skip-ci] packit: fix missing fedora arches
body:
Silly mistake on my end, of course we want to build on both arches.

Fixes: 9eb4d27c5c ("packit: only build F41+")

comments.body: Force pushed with skip-ci, the windows installer task is broken in cirrus right now and this PR doesn't need cirrus based testing.
@lsm5 mind merging this? Note like anyone else looks at packit here.
